creator: kamikaze@bsdforen.de
text:
Thanks to your help and the Porter's Handbook I was able to fix
things rather quick. I hope this one builds, now.


diff -Pur ports/cad/freehdl.orig/Makefile ports/cad/freehdl/Makefile
--- ports/cad/freehdl.orig/Makefile	2008-09-13 16:14:41.000000000 +0200
+++ ports/cad/freehdl/Makefile	2008-09-23 17:44:09.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,25 +6,25 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	freehdl
-PORTVERSION=	0.0.4
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.6
 CATEGORIES=	cad
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.home.hs-karlsruhe.de/~fado0011/ \
-		http://cran.mit.edu/~enaroska/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://freehdl.seul.org/~enaroska/
 
-MAINTAINER=	lon_kamikaze@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	kamikaze@bsdforen.de
 COMMENT=	A free VHDL simulator
 
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USE_PERL5=	yes
+USE_GNOME=	gnomehack \
+		pkgconfig
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:15
 HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--infodir=${PREFIX}/info \
 		--mandir=${MANPREFIX}/man
 
 MAN1=		freehdl-config.1 \
 		freehdl-gennodes.1 \
-		freehdl-libtool.1 \
 		freehdl-v2cc.1 \
 		gvhdl.1
 MAN5=		v2cc.libs.5
@@ -53,7 +53,12 @@
 		| ${PLIST_REPL} >> ${PLIST}
 	@${FIND} -d ${PLIST_TMP} -type d -mindepth 2 \
 		| ${SED} "s|${PLIST_TMP}|@dirrm |1" \
-		| ${PLIST_REPL} >> ${PLIST}
+		| ${PLIST_REPL} \
+		| ${GREP} -E '%%DATADIR%%|freehdl' >> ${PLIST}
+	@${FIND} -d ${PLIST_TMP} -type d -mindepth 2 \
+		| ${SED} "s|${PLIST_TMP}|@dirrmtry |1" \
+		| ${PLIST_REPL} \
+		| ${GREP} -vE '%%DATADIR%%|freehdl' >> ${PLIST}
 	@${RM} -rf ${PLIST_TMP}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -Pur ports/cad/freehdl.orig/distinfo ports/cad/freehdl/distinfo
--- ports/cad/freehdl.orig/distinfo	2008-09-13 16:14:41.000000000 +0200
+++ ports/cad/freehdl/distinfo	2008-09-13 16:17:09.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (freehdl-0.0.4.tar.gz) = 0992a05d61aad6d890a0eb1bc39655e8
-SHA256 (freehdl-0.0.4.tar.gz) = bfbbdb14b807eb3a125cf69919ac5ba4352ce36955c8b0063a4988f81b06c7f3
-SIZE (freehdl-0.0.4.tar.gz) = 1383255
+MD5 (freehdl-0.0.6.tar.gz) = bd168382c72f9fbd392f89ab2c5fddf8
+SHA256 (freehdl-0.0.6.tar.gz) = 7c80a55747f75eb3eff802bbb77e2528229f333b1e435cb4c3ae83b39d709845
+SIZE (freehdl-0.0.6.tar.gz) = 1391749
diff -Pur ports/cad/freehdl.orig/pkg-plist ports/cad/freehdl/pkg-plist
--- ports/cad/freehdl.orig/pkg-plist	2008-09-13 16:14:41.000000000 +0200
+++ ports/cad/freehdl/pkg-plist	2008-09-23 17:45:19.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@
+bin/freehdl-config
+bin/freehdl-gennodes
+bin/gvhdl
+bin/freehdl-v2cc
 include/freehdl/fire-types.h
 include/freehdl/fire-chunk.t
 include/freehdl/fire-chunk.h
@@ -63,11 +67,6 @@
 include/freehdl/std-memory.hh
 include/freehdl/std-standard.hh
 include/freehdl/std-vhdl-types.hh
-bin/freehdl-config
-bin/freehdl-gennodes
-bin/gvhdl
-bin/freehdl-v2cc
-bin/freehdl-libtool
 lib/libfreehdl-fire.so.0
 lib/libfreehdl-fire.so
 lib/libfreehdl-fire.la
@@ -102,9 +101,11 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/ieee/std_logic_arith.vhdl
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/ieee/math_real.vhdl
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/ieee/vital_timing.vhdl
+libdata/pkgconfig/freehdl.pc
 @dirrm include/freehdl
 @dirrm lib/freehdl
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/lib/std
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/lib/ieee
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/lib
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
+@dirrmtry libdata/pkgconfig
